title: Untied Output Local Calibration
research_question: Is the current untied output winner still locally mis-set around LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 and HEAD_LR=0.012?

candidates.name: g1-softcap15
candidates.hypothesis: The current winner may still be slightly overconfident, so stronger clipping at LOGIT_SOFTCAP=15 can improve the untied frontier.
candidates.description: tighten softcap from 20 to 15 on the current untied frontier

candidates.name: g2-softcap25
candidates.hypothesis: The current winner may already be slightly over-clipped, so relaxing to LOGIT_SOFTCAP=25 could recover useful confidence.
candidates.description: relax softcap from 20 to 25 on the current untied frontier

candidates.name: g3-headlr0010
candidates.hypothesis: The useful head-LR direction may be upward from 0.008, but the true local optimum could still sit slightly below 0.012.
candidates.description: slow head LR slightly from 0.012 to 0.010 on the current untied frontier

candidates.name: g4-headlr0016
candidates.hypothesis: The untied output head may still be under-updated, so raising HEAD_LR to 0.016 could improve the current frontier further.
candidates.description: speed head LR from 0.012 to 0.016 on the current untied frontier

candidates.name: g5-softcap15-headlr0016
candidates.hypothesis: If stronger clipping and faster head updates are both the right local directions, the combination may stack into one more immediate frontier gain.
candidates.description: stack tighter softcap and faster head LR on the current untied frontier
